task.goal: Control the one-legged robot so it hops forward without falling.
task.success_condition: A successful episode reaches a total score of at least 2500 before the 1000 step limit.
task.reward_description: The environment rewards forward velocity and survival, subtracts control cost, and terminates on unhealthy states. Higher total return is better.
notes: This is a MuJoCo locomotion task with three continuous torque actions.
The observation excludes absolute x position and includes body height, angles, and velocities.
Stable hopping requires coordinated periodic control rather than a single static action.

minimum_score.reason: Policy errors, invalid actions, evaluator failures, and workspace contract violations receive a conservative low score.

action_meanings.name: thigh_torque
action_meanings.meaning: Torque applied to the thigh joint in [-1, 1].

action_meanings.name: leg_torque
action_meanings.meaning: Torque applied to the leg joint in [-1, 1].

action_meanings.name: foot_torque
action_meanings.meaning: Torque applied to the foot joint in [-1, 1].
